zone_selector.title: Zones of Influence
zone_selector.description: Set your zones of influence to appear on the realm map
zone_selector.login_required: Please log in to manage your zones of influence
zone_selector.geolocation_hint: Use your device's location to quickly add a zone (permission required)
zone_selector.map_instructions: Click on the map to add a zone of influence at that location
zone_selector.no_zones: You haven't added any zones yet
zone_selector.confirm_remove: Are you sure you want to remove this zone?
zone_selector.enter_zone_name: Enter a name for this zone:
zone_selector.location_permission_denied: Location permission denied. You can still select zones manually on the map.
zone_selector.location_error: An error occurred while getting your location.
zone_selector.geolocation_not_supported: Geolocation is not supported by your browser
